title: Prod Miracle
fortuneText: Your code compiled on the first try with zero warnings. You are deeply suspicious it's a trap.
luckyAction: Don't touch anything and slowly walk away.

title: Deep Delusion
fortuneText: You think they are carefully typing a paragraph back to you. In reality, their screen is just stuck on 'is typing...'.
luckyAction: Overthink for 6 hours, then go to sleep.

title: Quantum Wallet
fortuneText: Your wealth is like quantum physics. When you don't check your bank balance, you feel rich. When you look, it collapses.
luckyAction: Uninstall banking apps to stay wealthy.

title: Friday Surprise
fortuneText: At 4:59 PM on Friday, you will find a critical bug that only you know how to fix, but you really don't want to.

title: Calorie Illusion
fortuneText: 今天点了一杯全糖奶茶。只要你在心里默念三遍“去冰等于零卡”，热量就追不上你。
luckyAction: 放心喝，欺骗一下大脑就行。

title: Social Ghost
fortuneText: 你发了一个自认为非常幽默的表情包到群里，结果换来了长达45分钟的死寂。

title: Sleep Loop
fortuneText: 你决定 11 点准时睡觉。当你刷完最后一个视频准备关机时，天已经亮了。
luckyAction: 别挣扎了，接受自己是个夜行生物的事实。

title: Gacha Despair
fortuneText: 你把积攒已久的抽卡资源全部砸进新卡池，结果只换来了一堆重复的 3 星垃圾。
luckyAction: 卸载游戏 10 分钟，然后再装回来。

title: Late Night Hunger
fortuneText: 凌晨 2 点的泡面香气足以让任何健身计划瞬间崩塌。
luckyAction: 加个蛋，这样就算半个健康餐了。

title: Browser Hell
fortuneText: 你的电脑风扇已经开始起飞，但你还是舍不得关掉那 47 个未读的网页标签。
luckyAction: 重启大法好，重启之后就不用面对了。

title: Reply Phobia
fortuneText: 你看到了一条重要消息，但因为太紧张，你决定把它标记为未读，假装它不存在。
luckyAction: 假装没看见，只要我不回，就没发生过。

title: Procrastination King
fortuneText: 你今天的任务列表里有 10 件事，但你却在研究如何高效地处理任务列表，导致一件都没做。
luckyAction: 再写一个“写任务列表”的任务安慰自己。
